segments.text: whenever you're in a fight with somebody
that you love look at that person as
8-year-old now why I'm saying this is
when we start looking at somebody as a
child we can look beyond the fight we
can look beyond their behavior and look
at their innocence right because at the
end of the day we are all grownup
children now this is a conflict
resolution technique that I came across
uh when I was reading this book 5 years
ago don't swe the small stuff
